text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, on my way back to my office...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Waaah! Hey, hear me out for a sec!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I'm a simp for everyone, not just my squad! But
it's not like I can vibe with everyone whenever I
want!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I know they're just as down bad for me,
but all these hangout invites got me cooked!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, what's the matter? I'm right here if you
need someone to talk to.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Oooh... Bestiiie! I need to raaant!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oooh okay, so you have too many friends you
wanna hang out with, and not enough time.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Straight facts! Like, I wuv all my friends! And I
have lots of fun chatting with you, but...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: There you are. It's time for our run, Helios.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
See?! I wanna hang out with Nature too! I'm
bummed, no cap!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I'm not here to hang out, we're supposed to
be partner running.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Helios! Hiya! I'm gonna do some bargain
hunting. Wanna come?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Bet! But I gotta race with Nature! And chat up
Palmer!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
This high-key suuuucks! What do I doooo?!
Heeelp!
choice_data_list: ...Why don't you all hang out together?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
OH! For real! We should all just have a party
together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... How about the dorm kitchen? It can fit
lots of people, and we don't gotta worry about
curfew.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, someone understood the assignment! That's
a fire idea! A pajama party!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Now that's giving teen spirit! I'll bring some
Umastagram-worthy drinks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
They organized a party just like that... Extroverts
really are scary...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Can you bring that dried squid you like, Nature? I just know it'd go viral!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh? When did I get reeled into this party?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You've gotta be there too! Having a trainer at the
party would be fire! WOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You've gotta be there too! Having a trainer at the
party would be fire! WOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Let's gooooo! You passed the vibe check! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
And as your rewaaard... You get to be the party
squad leader! Let's turn this party into a real
banger!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Fuji! We're gonna have a party at the dorm!
See ya there! ☆

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now, just a moment. Trainers are not allowed to
enter the dorms.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...I end up getting photos of the party later.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Just give up. There's no stopping Helios
once she's hooked on an idea.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Facts! Never underestimate a party animal! ☆
choice_data_list: Uh, trainers can't enter the dorms!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaat?! Are you for real?! Wanna wear my
uniform to get in then?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: That's a fun idea, but super obvious.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Boo! That's straight up sucks! But, well, dem's the
breaks! I'll tag you in the photos though!
